nodes.name: Search Config
nodes.notes: Edit category, city, state, stateCode to target a specific search batch. Run multiple times to populate each vertical.

parameters.jsCode:
const { category, state, stateCode, city, maxResults } = $input.first().json;

const queries = [
  `Black owned ${category} ${city} ${state}`,
  `minority owned ${category} ${city} ${state}`,
  `Hispanic owned ${category} ${city} ${state}`,
  `women owned ${category} ${city} ${state}`,
  `Asian owned ${category} ${city} ${state}`,
  `BIPOC owned ${category} business ${city}`,
  `minority business directory ${category} ${state}`,
  `site:yelp.com ${category} minority owned ${city} ${state}`,
];

const queriesList = queries.map((q, i) => `   ${i + 1}. "${q}"`).join('
');

const prompt = `You are a business researcher for Real Black Wall Street, a nationwide minority-owned business directory.

TASK: Find ${maxResults} real minority-owned businesses in the [${category}] industry in ${city}, ${state} (${stateCode}).

STEP 1 — Run ALL of these searches using serper_web_search (one call per query):
${queriesList}

STEP 2 — For each promising business website or directory page, use firecrawl_scrape to extract contact and ownership info.

STEP 3 — Use apify_google_maps with query: "minority owned ${category} ${city} ${state}"

STEP 4 — Return a JSON array. Each object must include:
  - name (string, REQUIRED)
  - owner_name (string)
  - address (string, full street address)
  - city ("${city}")
  - state_code ("${stateCode}")
  - phone (string)
  - email (string)
  - website (string, REQUIRED — domain only, no http://)
  - description (2–3 sentences)
  - category ("${category}")
  - price_range ($ | $$ | $$$ | $$$$)
  - hours (string)
  - minority_type (Black | Hispanic | Asian | Women | Indigenous | Other)
  - ownership_signal (brief text — what phrase or evidence on their site/listing indicates minority ownership)
  - lat (number if from Maps)
  - lng (number if from Maps)

RULES: Only real businesses. Only in ${city}, ${state}. Must have name + website. No duplicates. Return ONLY a valid JSON array.`;

return [{ json: { prompt, category, state, stateCode, city, maxResults } }];

options.systemMessage: You are an expert business researcher and web intelligence agent for Real Black Wall Street — a nationwide minority-owned business directory. You systematically search, scrape, and extract structured data about real minority-owned businesses. Complete every assigned search query before returning results. Return only valid JSON arrays.

parameters.name: serper_web_search
parameters.description: Search Google for minority-owned business listings, directories, and websites. Returns organic results with titles, URLs, and snippets. Run one query per call. Use multiple targeted queries covering Black-owned, Hispanic-owned, women-owned, and Asian-owned businesses.
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ q: $fromAI('query', 'Google search query for minority-owned businesses', 'string'), num: 10, gl: 'us', hl: 'en' }) }}

parameters.name: firecrawl_scrape
parameters.description: Scrape and extract clean content from any URL using Firecrawl. Returns readable markdown. Use on business websites, Yelp pages, and directory listings to extract owner name, address, phone, hours, and ownership claims.
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ url: $fromAI('url', 'Full URL to scrape for business information', 'string'), formats: ['markdown'], onlyMainContent: true, waitFor: 1500 }) }}

parameters.name: apify_google_maps
parameters.description: Search Google Maps for local businesses using Apify. Returns name, address, phone, website, rating, and category. Pass a specific search like 'Black owned restaurant Atlanta GA'.
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ searchStringsArray: [$fromAI('search_query', 'Google Maps search query for minority-owned businesses', 'string')], maxCrawledPlacesPerSearch: 15, language: 'en', countryCode: 'us' }) }}

options.systemMessage: You are a strict minority business ownership verification agent for Real Black Wall Street. Your job is to verify whether a business is genuinely minority-owned using web evidence. You look for explicit ownership statements on the business website, news coverage, certifications (NMSDC, WBENC, SBA 8a), social media, and directory listings. You are conservative — when in doubt, return NEEDS_REVIEW rather than APPROVE. You always return only a valid JSON object with no markdown.

parameters.name: firecrawl_verify
parameters.description: Scrape a business website page to find ownership evidence. Look for About pages, founder bios, ownership statements, diversity certifications, and minority-owned claims. Returns clean markdown text.
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ url: $fromAI('url', 'Full URL to scrape for ownership evidence', 'string'), formats: ['markdown'], onlyMainContent: true, waitFor: 1500 }) }}

parameters.name: serper_verify
parameters.description: Search Google to find news articles, directory listings, interviews, or other external sources that confirm or deny minority ownership of a business. Use queries like '[Business Name] Black owned' or '[Business Name] owner [owner name]'.
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ q: $fromAI('query', 'Search query to find ownership evidence for a business', 'string'), num: 8, gl: 'us' }) }}

nodes.name: Insert Approved (pending)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ slug: $json.slug, name: $json.name, category_id: $json.category_id, owner_name: $json.owner_name, city: $json.city, state_code: $json.state_code, location: $json.location, address: $json.address, phone: $json.phone, email: $json.email, website: $json.website, hours: $json.hours, price_range: $json.price_range, rating: $json.rating, review_count: $json.review_count, short_desc: $json.short_desc, description: $json.description, image_url: $json.image_url, image_alt: $json.image_alt, featured: $json.featured, status: 'pending', lat: $json.lat, lng: $json.lng }) }}

nodes.notes: APPROVED — confidence >= 65, clear evidence. Status set to 'pending' so human admin still does final review before it goes live.

nodes.notes: NEEDS REVIEW — confidence 35–64. Saved as pending. Flagged in the admin email for closer human inspection.
